Interior Designer

Designing spaces that feel elegant, functional, and timeless

A luxury interior design portfolio crafted like an international studio website, combining spatial storytelling, material depth, and cinematic 3D presentation.

Design experience
Global
Studio standard
3D-first
Concept delivery

Signature aesthetic

Dark, tactile, and warm. Every space is layered to feel calm, precise, and deeply lived in.

About

A design practice shaped by atmosphere, clarity, and proportion

The studio approaches interior design as an elegant orchestration of space, light, and material. Each project begins with the client's story and ends with a room that feels intentional, practical, and quietly luxurious.

Professional Introduction

I design interiors for clients who value precision, atmosphere, and long-term usability. My work spans homes, offices, studios, and hospitality-inspired spaces where every detail contributes to a calm and memorable experience.

Journey

From technical drafting to immersive 3D storytelling, the journey has been about translating vision into environments that are both beautiful and functional.

Philosophy

Luxury is not excess. It is restraint, comfort, material honesty, and an unwavering attention to how a space makes people feel.

Services

Comprehensive design services for refined living and working

From planning to execution support, the studio creates cohesive environments across residential and commercial briefs.

Premium spatial strategies tailored to the function, identity, and mood of each project.

Featured Projects

A portfolio of immersive, high-trust interiors

Each project is presented with concept, challenge, solution, and visual storytelling to mirror the experience of a premium design studio.

Scroll horizontally to explore the portfolio

Project 01

Photography & Podcast Studio

Creative production environment

Concept

A warm, acoustically controlled studio with editorial lighting and layered textures.

Challenge

The space had to support both visual recording and audio quality without feeling technical.

Solution

We combined soft wall treatments, concealed acoustic panels, sculptural lighting, and modular furniture to keep the room versatile and camera-ready.

Compare

Project 02

Tax Consulting & Auditing Firm Interior

Professional office interior

Concept

A refined, trust-forward workspace with strong circulation and executive privacy.

Challenge

The brief required a space that felt authoritative for clients while staying efficient for staff.

Solution

We used a disciplined palette, bespoke storage, private meeting zones, and a reception sequence that communicates credibility from the first step in.

Compare

Project 03

Bungalow Interior Renovation

Residential transformation

Concept

A layered home interior balancing heritage character with contemporary comfort.

Challenge

The renovation needed to modernize the home without flattening its identity.

Solution

We preserved architectural cues, introduced richer material transitions, improved daylight flow, and created generous bespoke millwork throughout the home.

Compare

Skills

A technical toolkit built for premium execution

The process blends design sensitivity with industry-standard drafting, 3D rendering, presentation, and coordination tools.

AutoCADSketchUpV-RayLumionRevit3ds MaxPhotoshopSpace PlanningMaterial SelectionLighting DesignBOQSite CoordinationClient Presentation
